credentials.name: GitHub Personal Access Token
credentials.notes: Update PAT AND infra secret when adding repos. Used by nightly workflow.

credentials.name: Meta Ads API User Access Token
credentials.notes: Long-lived token. Heartbeat running hourly until Standard Access granted (~March 10-11). Disable META_HEARTBEAT_ENABLED after.

credentials.name: Apple Developer Program Membership
credentials.notes: Auto-renew is on but verify payment method is current. Covers SidelineIQ, Dosie, Glossy Sports.

credentials.name: Mercury Banking API Token
credentials.scope: Read-only access to Mainline Apps LLC account
credentials.notes: No expiry. Rotate periodically as best practice. Used by spend-readiness endpoint.

credentials.name: RevenueCat Public API Key
credentials.scope: Public SDK key — safe to embed in client apps
credentials.notes: Public key, no expiry. One per app (SidelineIQ, Dosie, Glossy Sports).

credentials.name: Anthropic API Key
credentials.scope: Claude API access for nightly agents
credentials.notes: No expiry. Credit balance monitored by credit-check job in nightly workflow.

credentials.name: Supabase Service Role Key
credentials.scope: Full access to agent infrastructure database
credentials.notes: No expiry. Rotate if compromised. Used by nightly workflow and Command Center.

credentials.name: App Store Connect API Key (9D66F38K8S)
credentials.scope: Admin — all apps (SidelineIQ, Dosie, Glossy Sports)
credentials.notes: No expiry. .p8 download is one-shot — cannot re-download. B64-encoded in GH secret ASC_PRIVATE_KEY_B64. Issuer: 3ffa412d-6e29-4eb6-b0b1-0f1daa7c60e9.

credentials.name: Apple Distribution Certificate (355835LV94)
credentials.scope: Code signing for all iOS apps
credentials.notes: Managed by EAS. Expiry will break all builds. Renew via Expo dashboard or manually.
